<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Swingrate
$MDPS$ = $DPS$ * Max Hits
$FNC-COST$ = 525; 450; 1687; 2000; 6000; 13900
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$MCE$ = Total Price / $MDPS$
$WCFR$ = {{#expr:Gladiator Stats.Swingrate / 1.65 round 3}}
$WCDPS$ = Gladiator Stats.Damage / Swingrate
$MWCDPS$ = $WCDPS$ * Gladiator Stats.Max Hits
$WCCE$ = $TP$ / $WCDPS$
$MWCCE$ = $TP$ / $MWCDPS$
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FSE-UPGRADE$ = Warrior Armor; Dangersense; Extra Protection; Illumina; Darkheart Swordsman
$FSE-UPGRADEICON$ = 3356186535; 141745478; 4118882122; 16620737; 16868189
$FSE-DETECTION$ = 0; ;
$FSE-CATEGORY$ = Exclusive
$DREF$ = <ref>DPS assumes that only one enemy is hit per swing.<br />Ability is not taken into account.</ref>
$MDREF$ = <ref>DPS assumes that the maximum number of enemies are hit per swing.<br/>Ability is not taken into account.</ref>
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="11" | Gladiator Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Swingrate !! Max Hits !! Range !! Parry Cooldown !! DPS$DREF$ !! Max DPS$MDREF$ !! Cost Efficiency !! Max Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 5 || 0.95 || 2 || 5.5 || 1.25 || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$MCE$}}
|-
| 1  || {{Money|$TP$}} || 7 || 0.75 || 2 || 5.5 || 1.25 || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$MCE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 17 || 0.75 || 2 || 5.5 || 1.25 || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$MCE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 37 || 1 || 5 || 6 || 1.25 || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$MCE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 77 || 1 || 7 || 6 || 1.25 || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$MCE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 177 || 1.35 || 10 || 6.5 || 1.25 || $DPS$ || $MDPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}} || {{Money|$MCE$}}
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="6" | Ability Stats
|-
! Level !! Swingrate !! DPS$DREF$ !! Max DPS$MDREF$ !! Cost Efficiency !! Max Cost Efficiency
|-
| 3 || $WCFR$ || $WCDPS$ || $MWCDPS$ || {{Money|$WCCE$}} || {{Money|$MWCCE$}}
|-
| 4 || $WCFR$ || $WCDPS$ || $MWCDPS$ || {{Money|$WCCE$}} || {{Money|$MWCCE$}}
|-
| 5 || $WCFR$ || $WCDPS$ || $MWCDPS$ || {{Money|$WCCE$}} || {{Money|$MWCCE$}}
|}
</div>
